description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily white with sections of light brown paneling, creating a visually appealing contrast. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically placed on the front and side facades, allowing for ample natural light. The property includes a green lawn and a paved driveway that runs alongside the house, leading to what appears to be a garage or secondary entrance. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or overhang. The overall structure is compact, single-story, and designed for a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and brown exterior, large windows, and a side driveway. The design is clean and geometric, suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, and the driveway running parallel to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, white exterior, and the full length of the driveway and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with two large windows and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, a prominent rectangular feature, and the driveway curving away.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or overhang, flush with the facade and directly accessible from the walkway.
